seed_instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 8 sentences, with the first paragraph containing exactly 3 sentences and the second paragraph containing exactly 5 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain three paragraphs.
instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. The response must contain exactly 8 sentences, with the first paragraph containing exactly 3 sentences and the second paragraph containing exactly 5 sentences. The response must contain three paragraphs.
response:
The team begins the week with a kickoff meeting to align on the new app feature goals. During the first three days, developers will focus intensively on writing clean and efficient code. We will hold a daily stand-up to ensure everyone stays on track with their specific tasks.

On day four, the focus shifts entirely to rigorous testing to identify and fix any bugs found during development. The QA team will work alongside engineers to validate the feature across different devices and scenarios. A mid-week review session will be scheduled to discuss progress and address any technical hurdles.

The final two days are reserved for final integration, performance optimization, and preparing the release documentation. We will conclude the week with a retrospective meeting to analyze what went well and what needs improvement. This structured approach ensures a smooth delivery of the new feature by the end of the week.
